attributes.action: change all period products to a free cost
attributes.additional_details: so many girls and women out there don't have enough money to be able to get the period products that they need, having this opportunity would mean they can access the products they need anytime
attributes.background: to ensure all shops and school hand out period products for free cost

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petitions, which call for similar action:

Fund free female sanitary products for all women and girls
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/756958

Fund free female sanitary products in Public Restrooms
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/741219
